name: ASRock B450M PRO4 R2.0 Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B450 Chipset - Supports DDR4-3200+(OC) - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 2.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 2.0 x1 - CrossFireX Ready - 2x M.2 Socket3 - USB 3.2 Gen2 Type-C+A - HDMI - DVI-D - D-Sub - Gigabit LAN
shortName: ASRock B450M PRO4 R2.0 Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket AM4 - AMD B450
description: Budget-friendly Micro ATX motherboard for AMD Ryzen with B450 chipset and multiple PCIe slots for expandability.

specs.pcie_slots: 1x PCIe 3.0 x16, 1x PCIe 2.0 x16, 1x PCIe 2.0 x1
